svg.title: AgentOS System Architecture
svg.desc: Seven-layer architecture from top to bottom: API Surface (generateText, streamText, agent, agency), Cognitive Substrate (GMI coordinator with persona overlay, sentiment tracker, metaprompt executor), Memory and RAG (working memory, episodic, semantic, 8 cognitive mechanisms, HyDE, GraphRAG, 7 vector backends), Tools and Capabilities (orchestrator, extensions, skills, capability discovery, emergent tool forging), Guardrails (5-tier security, PII redaction, ML classifiers, grounding guard, HITL), Orchestration (workflow, mission, AgentGraph, checkpointing), and I/O and Providers (voice pipeline, channel adapters, media generation, 21 LLM providers).
svg.text: Seven cooperating layers · API surface at the top, channels and providers at the floor · cognition + memory in the middle

g.text: High-level helpers — pure functions for one-shot calls, factories for stateful agents
Per-agent coordinator that owns persona, mood, working state, and the per-turn reasoning trace
4-tier memory with 8 cognitive mechanisms · HyDE + GraphRAG retrieval · 7 vector backends · 70.2% LongMemEval-M
100+ extension packs · 88 curated SKILL.md modules · runtime tool forging with judge-gated approval
Two-phase dispatcher · 4-tier PII redaction · ONNX classifiers · NLI grounding · 5 approval triggers
3 authoring APIs compile to one IR · graph runtime executes every plan · checkpoint + resume across nodes
Voice pipeline · channel adapters · media generation · 21 LLM providers with fallback chains
